items.name: Seed-Generator
items.description: Professional BIP-39 Seed & HD Wallet Toolkit with 12–24 word mnemonics, checksum validation, BIP-44/49/84 derivation, and multi-chain support (BTC, ETH, SOL, LTC, DOGE, ADA, DOT, AVAX, ATOM, XRP, TRX). Features offline CSPRNG, PBKDF2-HMAC-SHA512, AES-256-GCM encryption, wallet recovery, CSV/JSON export, and custom derivation paths.

items.name: lecture-video-maker
items.description: AI-powered lecture video generator: Ollama + Edge-TTS + Pexels + FFmpeg. Web UI with live progress tracking.

items.name: cheat-on-skill
items.description: 帮你在 AI 时代找到一份高薪 × 你学得动 × 不会被 AI 吃掉的工作，并给出个性化学习陪跑计划。能力匹配 + 可学性闸门 + BOSS 直聘真实招聘数据 + 反诈。

items.name: openclip
items.description: Download videos from almost any website. Lightweight, self-hosted media downloader with a clean web UI.

items.name: AlwaysStrong
items.description: Strong Play Integrity in one drop in module TEESimulator-RS + PlayIntegrityFork bundled.

items.name: credit-card-approval-prediction
items.description: an aiml project to predit credit card approvals

items.name: franken_markdown
items.description: Pure-Rust, dependency-lean, ultra-fast Markdown -> beautiful all-in-one HTML & tiny optimized PDF (library + single-binary CLI: fmd)

items.name: verso_notes
items.description: Local-first notes app. Your notes are plain Markdown files with wikilinks, backlinks, Bases, journal, PDF annotation, and much more

items.name: CLSE
items.description: [ECCV 2026🔥] Code for "Spectral Evolution-Guided Token Pruning in Multimodal Large Language Models"

items.name: Pathfinder-X1
items.description: Sub-250g thrust-vectored flying wing — autonomous, outdoor. MATLAB MDO pipeline + ArduPilot/PX4 flight stack.

items.name: 30-days-of-rust
items.description: A structured, interactive, and deep 30-day Rust programming curriculum. Learn systems coding with step-by-step guides, visual memory models, compiler error analysis, and 5 complete graduation projects. Covers basic syntax to multi-threaded async servers. Designed as a modern interactive textbook for developers.

items.name: agnes-ai-creator
items.description: 基于 Agnes AI 的自托管多模态 Web 客户端，支持 AI 对话、文生图/图生图、文生视频/图生视频。Vue 3 + FastAPI 全栈。

items.name: hermes-a2a-bridge
items.description: Local-first Hermes Agent bridge for the Agent-to-Agent Protocol HTTP+JSON subset

items.name: CharacterX
items.description: Standalone AI pipeline that turns a text prompt (optionally plus a character concept image) into a transparent-background 6×5 character sprite sheet with Phaser-ready animation metadata.
